speaker: Daiana Fernández Molero
text: Regulation should be approached with caution — bad or politically motivated regulation (e.g. Argentine housing price controls) backfires — and large social spending alone does not address inequality or voter grievances; what matters is spending correctly, with transparency and evaluation.
context: Warned against rushing to regulate AI without understanding it; cited failure of Argentina's earlier large social-benefit regime.

addressed_in_artifacts.voice_name: Plato son of Ariston, of the deme Collytus — though when I write I withdraw my name from the page; you will hear me only through Socrates and the others.
